title: Note Block Crates
description: Changes the texture for Note Blocks to resemble that of a wooden crate
body:
A simple resource pack that replaces the default texture of Note Blocks with one resembling a wooden crate

![A crate between a pile of logs and a barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ElaOGxMN/images/e1c12bb910bf4d8c6a9b72e45de72c3588f62103.jpeg)
